nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Session (Scrolled)
nodes.description: Home tab in 'Sesión Activa' (active session) state, scrolled down to reveal ritual and learning sections. Shows 'Estás en la zona.' hero heading, circular session timer at 13:17 recovered with 21:43 remaining, session summary (45 min - 13 min de claridad), 'Finalizar sesión' CTA, app protection badge (3 apps blocked: Instagram, TikTok, YouTube), 'Descanso' label, 'Tu ritual de hoy' section (no routines configured), 'Mi aprendizaje del día' section.

nodes.label: Session Timer Card — 13:17 Recovered
nodes.description: Circular progress timer card displaying 'RECUPERASTE 13:17' with '21:43 quedan' subtitle and session stats '45 min - 13 min de claridad'. Has edit/pencil icon top-right and red 'Finalizar sesión' button.

nodes.label: App Protection Badge — 3 Apps Blocked
nodes.description: Green shield badge 'PROTECCIÓN ACTIVA — 3 apps fuera de tu mente' with app pill chips for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube. 'Descanso' label shown alongside.

nodes.label: Tu Ritual de Hoy — Empty State
nodes.description: Section 'Tu ritual de hoy' with subtitle 'Sin rutinas — agrega las que quieres practicar' and a row item to configure ritual routines (Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más).

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Dev Panel — Home Active State
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel 'Mentex Tweaks' visible on right side. Sections: AUTH (DEV) with navigation shortcuts, ESTADO with Home/Inactivo/Activo toggle (Activo selected), ACENTO with color principal swatch, ESTILO DE CARDS with Glass/Líneas/Plano options (Glass selected), TIPOGRAFÍA with Geist/Inter/Manrope options (Inter selected).

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks — Developer Configuration Panel
nodes.description: Floating developer panel present in all four screenshots. Controls: AUTH shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo) per tab, ACENTO color picker, ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA family (Geist/Inter/Manrope). Used for rapid QA and design iteration without rebuilding.
